description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure with a slender build, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. She wears a fitted, long-sleeve turtleneck sweater tucked into high-waisted jeans that feature visible stitched patterns. Her footwear consists of chunky, ankle-high boots with a glossy finish. The figure has a high, voluminous ponytail hairstyle and wears glasses, adding a modern, urban touch. Her facial features are defined, and her hands are relaxed at her sides, with fingers slightly spread. The overall appearance suggests a casual, contemporary pedestrian suitable for city or neighborhood environments.
description: A modern adult woman in a turtleneck sweater, patterned jeans, and boots, with a high ponytail and glasses, standing upright. The style is casual and urban, with defined features and a relaxed posture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial features, glasses, turtleneck sweater, and the full front of the jeans and boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the ponytail's volume, and the side seam of the jeans and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the sweater, jeans, and the full length of the ponytail, as well as the back of the boots.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, ponytail, and the right side of the outfit and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted turtleneck sweater and high-waisted jeans with visible stitching, accessorized with glasses
